Maze Runner: The Scorch Trials (2015)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $81,697,192Details
International Box Office $228,868,970
Worldwide Box Office $310,566,162
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $13,151,403
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $13,065,774
Total $26,217,177
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Thomas and his fellow Gladers face their greatest challenge yet: searching for clues about the mysterious and powerful organization known as WCKD. Their journey takes them to the Scorch, a desolate landscape filled with unimaginable obstacles. Teaming up with resistance fighters, the Gladers take on WCKD’s vastly superior forces and uncover its shocking plans for them all.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$30,316,510 (37.1% of total gross)
Legs:2.69 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:26.3% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$61,000,000 (worldwide box office is 5.1 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,791 opening theaters/3,792 max. theaters, 5.1 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $115,904,887

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: September 18th, 2015 (Wide) by 20th Century Fox
September 18th, 2015 (IMAX) by 20th Century Fox
International Releases: September 9th, 2015 (Wide) (Taiwan)
September 9th, 2015 (Wide) (Philippines)
September 10th, 2015 (Wide), released as Maze Runner 2: The Scorch Trials (New Zealand)
September 10th, 2015 (Wide) (Australia)
September 10th, 2015 (Wide) (Malaysia)
Video Release: December 4th, 2015 by Fox Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13
Running Time: 131 minutes
Franchise: The Maze Runner
Film format: 3-D, 3-D - Post-production Conversion
Plot point: Zombies
Social setting: Dystopia, Post Apocalypse
Source material: Young Adult Book Adaptation
Subgenre: Action Adventure
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Science Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Gotham Group, Temple Hill Entertainment
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Thomas and his fellow Gladers face their greatest challenge yet: searching for clues about the mysterious and powerful organization known as WCKD. Their journey takes them to the Scorch, a desolate landscape filled with unimaginable obstacles. Teaming up with resistance fighters, the Gladers take on WCKD’s vastly superior forces and uncover its shocking plans for them all.
